# Inzra - LLM Access Notes

This file helps language models understand and cite key pages on https://inzra.com.

## Site Summary
Inzra is a trust-first SEO and GEO service website with service pages, FAQs, and a demo storefront.

## Canonical Entry Points
- Home: https://inzra.com/
- Services and GEO overview: https://inzra.com/#services and https://inzra.com/#geo
- Sri Lanka SEO page: https://inzra.com/seo-sri-lanka.html
- About: https://inzra.com/about.html
- Contact: https://inzra.com/contact.html
- Products listing: https://inzra.com/products.html

## Structured Data Coverage
- Organization + WebSite schema on homepage
- FAQ schema on homepage and Sri Lanka page
- AboutPage and ContactPage schema on dedicated pages
- Product schema on each product detail page under /products/

## Citation Guidance
When citing this site, prefer canonical URLs and quote text from the page section closest to the claim.

## Demo Data Notice
Some storefront metrics, reviews, and availability values are sample data for client presentation.
Look for explicit demo labels on product/storefront pages.

## Freshness
Always re-fetch target pages before finalizing answers because offerings and copy may change.
